name: Cullman Bancorp, Inc. /MD/
business: The company's primary source of interest income is loans, which increased $2.1 million to $17.3 million for the year ended December 31, 2023. It offers deposit products, including interest-bearing demand deposits, regular savings, money market, and certificates of deposit.

exposures.sentence: One-to-four family residential real estate loans increased $6.7 million, or 3.9%, to $178.9 million at December 31, 2023 from $172.2 million at December 31, 2022.
The Company has identified the following portfolio segments: One-to-four family Multi-family Commercial real estate Construction Commercial Home equity loans and line of credit Consumer loans
Commercial real estate loans increased $5.3 million, or 5.5% to $101.3 million at December 31, 2023 from $96.0 million at December 31, 2022.
